challenges.title: Fix Color-Only Status Indicators
challenges.description: Given a list of status indicators that only use color (green/red/orange dots), refactor them to include text labels and icons.
challenges.starterCode:
• Active
  • Inactive
  • Pending
challenges.hint: Use ::before pseudo-elements to add Unicode symbols like ✓, ✗, and ⏳.

challenges.title: Accessible Form Validation
challenges.description: Create a form with validation that uses color, icons, and text messages to indicate errors. Use aria attributes for screen reader support.
challenges.hint: Use aria-describedby on the input pointing to an error message span. Style the error state with border color + icon + text.

challenges.title: Perceptually Accessible Theme System
challenges.description: Build a complete CSS custom property theme system using OKLCH colors that maintains WCAG AAA contrast across light and dark modes.
challenges.hint: Use color-mix() and relative color syntax to derive accessible pairs. Test contrast ratios mathematically.
